item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.4
Safety hardening and interface polish.
- Closes the last gap in protected-host safety: Auto Duck can no longer engage a locked app or a protected live host under any circumstance, and every saved or imported configuration is repaired on load so stale entries can never request a tap. - Blocks the entire Rogue Amoeba routing family (ARK, Loopback, Audio Hijack engines) from capture, not just the current daemon. - Engaged apps no longer have their effect chains rebuilt in the background — active EQ and dynamics now run without periodic resets. - Hearing protection stays on: per-device volume ceilings keep guarding your ears even if the trial clock runs out. - The instant ducker's global shortcut moved to ⌃⌥⌘D so it never collides with Mail's Send shortcut (⌘⇧D). - Clearer mixer: the keyboard-selected app is now visibly highlighted, bypassed effects show a one-click Restore button, and destructive deletes ask first. - Dozens of small wording, accessibility, and consistency fixes across the mixer, settings, and scenes.
